principle: A visual system should reveal relationships, not decorate content.

elements.name: Telemetry Label
elements.purpose: Expose state, domain, confidence, or relationship without adding paragraph text.

elements.name: Connection Band
elements.purpose: Show a vertical relationship path among related ideas, essays, frameworks, or observations.

elements.name: System Map Surface
elements.purpose: Frame a group of ideas as part of an interacting system rather than a flat list.

elements.name: Evidence Surface
elements.purpose: Separate what is observed from what is assumed.

elements.name: System Annotation
elements.purpose: Add interpretive context without interrupting the primary reading path.
